name: Wess Fisher
text: This is my go-to spot whenever I want to relax and enjoy a cigar. Just the Tip has a great atmosphere and it's the kind of place where you can really unwind. The owner is one of the most welcoming people you'll meet — very friendly, compassionate, and extremely knowledgeable about cigars. You never feel like just another customer here. It feels more like hanging out with friends who share the same appreciation for a good smoke. Highly recommend it.

name: Andrew Hill
text: Quality spot to burn a stick, hours are great!

name: michael gaska
text: I'm a cigar novice. They gave me great advice on what to buy. I will be back!

name: Tim
text: SAM IS AWESOME. MY FELLOW STICK SMOKERS, ALWAYS VERY FRIENDLY. COMPARABLE ATMOSPHERE. GREAT SELECTION.

name: Jamone Watson
text: The best selection — the way the owners explain it to me, on a scale of 1 to 10, I give them a 10 across the board. The first time I went there they had open arms, same service I received the other day. I will be back, thanks again.

name: Santo Hruby
text: Great cigars! The Owner Sam is great!

name: JAE WILLIAMS
text: This place is incredible! Sam is extremely knowledgeable and helpful. I learn something new every time I go. Definitely my go-to spot for cigars!

name: Greye Brooks
text: I'm new to smoking cigars and Sam the owner is super friendly and really really knowledgeable on cigars — he even tells you what drink goes good with the cigars, whether it be coffee or liquor. The atmosphere is amazing.

name: Brett A
text: Sam and his wife have truly done an incredible job with their shop. Sam is first class in terms of his knowledge and service. He spent 10 minutes just helping guide me through the process to get the perfect selection. I can't wait to see where this business goes as they grow.

name: Robert Brooks
text: I am new to the cigar industry. The first time I walked in I was greeted by the owner Sam — one hell of a nice guy. He showed me around the shop and explained the different cigars. The next time I went in he remembered my name and what type of cigars I purchased and asked my opinion. I would recommend this place to anyone who is a novice like myself. Sam is knowledgeable on all aspects of the cigar lines.

name: Patrick Smith
text: I've been a visitor on a number of occasions — the only problem I have is a quick trip for a cigar seems to turn into an hour long BS session. Sam should have a podcast for cigars. He and his staff are the most knowledgeable in the Pittsburgh area. Simple — it's just a nice place. And they know what they are talking about!

name: Ed Strauss
text: Perfect one stop shop for your cigar needs. Great place to relax and try out something new or an old favorite.

name: Todd David Breninghouse
text: I went in to this shop today to buy a few cigars for a road trip. As soon as I walked in I was immediately greeted by Sam, the owner. He shook my hand and we proceeded into the humidor. He immediately asked me what my preference was and offered suggestions. This is the way a cigar shop is supposed to be! I am a veteran cigar smoker and this was such a breath of fresh air. I definitely will be back to enjoy the lounge. GREAT WORK SAM!!

name: Frederick Sumner
text: What an amazing awesome place the owner has made his Cigar Lounge into. Good people, great service.

name: Laurie Moran
text: Great place! Very welcoming and friendly!

name: Gabriel Enck
text: Has the most knowledgeable staff!

name: A J Scarpaci
text: Sam and his staff know their cigars and they know mine! The best selection in the area. Like family — you're always welcomed here.

name: John Stepansky
text: Stopped into Just the Tip to pick up a smoke for a beautiful Saturday afternoon. As soon as I walked in Sam shook my hand like he'd known me forever and gave some great recommendations. He even took the time to give me a tour of the lounge. I'm not a frequent cigar smoker, but when I do, I'll be visiting Sam and company at Just the Tip!

name: luke harto
text: Sam's place was so clean, organized, and VERY knowledgeable. The atmosphere was welcoming and the humidor was packed! 10/10 coming back.

name: Bujin
text: Best cigar lounge around. Sam takes good care of you — all the regulars are like family but better lol.

name: PSU 31 !
text: Always 1st class service. Sam's product knowledge is off the charts regarding all aspects of the cigar industry.

name: Bruce Rayner
text: Great place to sit and talk with friends. Super choices of cigars around.

name: Garrett Besonson
text: Unique selection and great customer service!

name: Don's Woodies
text: Great cigar shop in South Park. Sam was born to be a cigar shop owner. Friendliest guy you will ever meet, and quite knowledgeable about cigars. He has been spot on with his suggestions for me. His wife is no slouch either — maybe knows as much as him. Just recently getting back into smoking cigars and this place is the best.

name: Joe Wills
text: Excellent place to buy cigars and accessories. Awesome selection. Sam is very knowledgeable.

name: Mark Labbett
text: A great place to chill and have a smoke. Whether you want to just sit, smoke, and not be bothered, or if you came to socialize, this is the place. A no judgment zone and you will meet the most interesting people! Sam knows his cigars and will give you honest opinions. Stop in!

name: Christopher M
text: Very nice selection of cigars, paired with some of the comfiest furniture around. Very comfortable atmosphere with knowledgeable proprietor.

name: Ashley Urlakis
text: I stopped by this cigar shop today to find my husband a cigar. I was hesitant at first to stop in but Sam was so welcoming and helpful. He helped me pick out the perfect cigar and I found the nicest little dual purpose cigar holder that his dad hand crafted! Highly recommend.

name: Adam Winkler
text: Great selection of cigars.

name: Colin Veraldi
text: Great atmosphere, great people. Can't think of a better place to hangout.

name: Sharon Davis
text: Great experience. Comfortable and inviting. Large variety, priced to keep me coming back. Sam's cigar knowledge is amazing — always providing new info and pairing suggestions.

name: Robert Lasich
text: I just discovered Sam's place! This is the best cigar shop in Western Pennsylvania hands down! Sam's product knowledge is without error. Sam will spend whatever time is necessary to ensure that his customers are properly taken care of. He goes above and beyond the call of duty for his customers. He loves what he does and his customers are the beneficiaries of that! Please stop by and see for yourself.

name: Tommy Skantz
text: Amazing place to have a good time. Owner is awesome and he knows his cigars!

name: Dan Massimino
text: Great place, great people, amazing times.

name: Josh Cannon
text: There are many reasons to choose this cigar lounge over others. First is the owner, Sam — the guy is great. Knows as much about cigars as you could ever hope for and is the best I have seen at figuring out your preferences and making spot-on recommendations. Second is the selection — so many less common choices. I have learned so much and enjoyed so many new cigars thanks to Sam's knowledge and selection. Can't recommend this place strongly enough.

name: Dave Moore
text: Great shop, very nice selection. Sam is very knowledgeable and engaged. Must try!

name: Bryce Walter
text: Great place, very informative staff, fair prices.
